subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Nov. 1921 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: This is the writing of his honor Zein, who was a scribe of the Blessed Beauty. Every tablet penned by his hand is authentic and correct [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خط جناب زین سند است جناب زین کاتب جمال مبارک بود هر لوحی که بخط اوست صحیح و درست
